channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia to Buy Foreign Currency as Iran War Boosts Oil Revenue
item.description: Russia will resume foreign currency purchases for the first time since the Ukraine war, as high oil prices from the Iran conflict boost Moscow export revenues.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Rejects Iran Criticism of US Defense Partnerships
item.description: The UAE stated its international defense partnerships are a sovereign matter, dismissing Iranian claims that Abu Dhabi cooperation with the US threatens Iranian security.

item.title: ⚠️ Russia Warns Diplomats to Evacuate Kyiv Before May 9
item.description: Russia warned foreign diplomatic missions to evacuate staff from Kyiv if Moscow launches mass strikes in response to Ukrainian attempts to disrupt Victory Day commemorations.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Fires Missile in Joint Drill With US Allies Near South China Sea
item.description: Japan Self-Defense Forces fired an anti-ship missile during a joint exercise with US, Australian, and Philippine forces in waters facing the South China Sea.

item.title: 🇪🇺 G7 Trade Ministers Seek Unity on Critical Minerals Supply
item.description: G7 trade ministers meeting in Paris sought common ground on securing critical mineral supplies dominated by China, as fresh US tariff threats against EU cars risked straining unity.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Strikes Beirut, Targeting Hezbollah Commander
item.description: Israel carried out an airstrike on Beirut's southern suburbs for the first time since the April ceasefire, saying it targeted a senior commander of Hezbollah's elite Radwan force. The strike marks a major breach of the fragile truce.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇮🇷 China's Wang Yi Meets Iranian Foreign Minister Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi met Iran's Abbas Araghchi in Beijing, calling for efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The meeting comes a week before Trump's scheduled visit to meet Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Accuses Russia of Violating Kyiv-Proposed Ceasefire
item.description: President Zelenskiy said Russia carried out dozens of attacks during a unilateral ceasefire Ukraine proposed for 72 hours, calling it Moscow's "obvious spurning" of peace efforts.

item.title: 📺 CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies at 87
item.description: Ted Turner, the brash entrepreneur who founded CNN and revolutionized 24-hour news, has died at 87. Turner transformed television news with the launch of CNN in 1980.

item.title: 🚢 UK Advises Hantavirus Cruise Ship Returnees to Self-Isolate
item.description: British health authorities advised two people who returned from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius to self-isolate. The ship departed for Spain's Canary Islands after three evacuations.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia Commits $7 Billion to Boost Fuel Stockpiles Amid Supply Concerns
item.description: Australia will expand onshore fuel reserves to at least 50 days of supply, creating a government reserve of 1 billion liters to shield against future supply shocks following Middle East disruptions.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚁 China Enables Iran's Shahed Drone Supply Lines, Nikkei Analysis Finds
item.description: A Nikkei Asia analysis examines how China facilitates Iran's Shahed drone production, which has been used extensively by Russia in Ukraine and by Iranian-backed groups across the Middle East.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Beirut Residents Describe Exhaustion After Israeli Strike Shatters Ceasefire
item.description: Residents in Beirut's southern suburbs express exhaustion and sadness after Israel struck the capital for the first time since the Hezbollah ceasefire, targeting a Radwan Force commander.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran reviews US peace proposal as war diplomacy intensifies
item.description: Iran is reviewing a US proposal to formally end the war, though key demands on Irans nuclear program and reopening the Strait of Hormuz remain unresolved. The development comes as Irans foreign minister meets Chinas top diplomat in Beijing ahead of Trump-Xi summit.

item.title: 🚢🦠 Hantavirus cruise ship heads to Canary Islands amid health emergency
item.description: A luxury cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak departed for Spains Canary Islands after 3 passengers were evacuated. Four people have died from the outbreak, with at least 8 confirmed infections aboard the Dutch-flagged MV Hondius.

item.title: ⛪🇺🇸 Vatican cardinal calls Trump attacks on Pope Leo strange before Rubio visit
item.description: A senior Vatican cardinal criticized President Trumps public attacks on Pope Leo over the Iran war as strange, one day before US Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to meet with the pontiff. Tensions between Washington and the Vatican have escalated over differing approaches to the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Deploys Aircraft Carrier to Red Sea for Potential Hormuz Mission
item.description: France moved its carrier strike group to the Red Sea as part of planning for a possible mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz, urging Washington and Tehran to consider a diplomatic proposal given the global economic impact of their competing blockades.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Euro Zone Services Activity Contracts for First Time in Nearly a Year
item.description: Euro zone services activity slumped in April, contracting for the first time in almost a year as weakening demand and the Middle East war weighed on consumer-facing sectors. The deterioration adds to concerns about Europe economic resilience.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Weighs Bigger Stake to Block Italian Takeover of Commerzbank
item.description: German government members are examining a drastic step to take a bigger stake in Commerzbank to fend off UniCredit unwanted bid, viewing the lender as strategic. The move reflects growing European banking tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran Deal Framework Emerging After Trump Pauses Hormuz Operation
item.description: The US and Iran are moving toward a negotiation framework after Trump halted a maritime escort mission in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran is reviewing a US proposal while key sticking points over uranium enrichment remain unresolved.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Modi BJP Seizes Historic Control of West Bengal, Extending Grip to 70% of Indian States
item.description: Narendra Modi ruling coalition now controls roughly 70% of India state legislatures after BJP stunning conquest of West Bengal, ending three consecutive terms of Mamata Banerjee Trinamool Congress. The victory represents the conquest of the party final frontier.

item.title: 🚢 US Navy Disables Iranian Oil Tanker in Gulf of Oman
item.description: US military disabled an Iranian-flagged oil tanker in the Gulf of Oman on Wednesday for allegedly violating the blockade of Iranian ports, marking continued tensions even as diplomatic talks progress.

item.title: 💰 Central Banks Pause Rate Cuts as Iran War Roils Markets
item.description: The Iran conflict has forced major central banks to hold interest rates steady in April, disrupting global monetary easing efforts amid inflation pressures and market volatility.

item.title: 🎭 Pussy Riot Protesters Swarm Russia's Venice Biennale Pavilion
item.description: Activists from Pussy Riot and FEMEN staged a protest against Russia's presence at the Venice Biennale, releasing colored smoke and swarming the pavilion in pink balaclavas.

item.title: 🏛️ FBI Searches Virginia Senate Leader's Office in Corruption Probe
item.description: The FBI executed a search warrant at Virginia Senate Leader Louise Lucas's office as part of an ongoing corruption investigation.
